name: Vegetable Soup with Lentils (Vegan)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring the chicken (or vegetable) broth and lentils to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and add the chopped mushrooms, celery, potato, onion, carrot, bell pepper, lemon juice, garlic, bay leaves, parsley, savory, thyme, oregano, salt, and pepper.
3. Cover and simmer for one hour.
4. Before serving, remove the bay leaves.
5. Puree half of the soup in a blender and stir it back into the rest of the soup to thicken.
